goal: turn the aspect table foundation into a server-backed research table flow
implemented: ClientAspectData added for synced known aspects and aspect pool.
openResearchTable now syncs both research and aspect knowledge.
ResearchTableScreen now shows known/unknown aspect state from synced client data.
ResearchTableScreen sends valid two-aspect combinations to server.
ResearchTableFoundation.combine now consumes aspect pool inputs for non-creative players and discovers/reinforces result server-side.
ResearchTableBlock syncs aspect knowledge after paper/ink/note/item table interactions.
why_this_is_not_a_costyl: Client clicks do not fake discoveries locally; they send a request to server.
Server is the source of truth for known aspects and aspect pool.
The GUI only renders synced aspect data.
Aspect combination uses the TC4 aspect component graph from Stage100.
still_needed_before_final_research_table: Exact TC4 research note hex/grid minigame.
Server packet for moving/linking aspect nodes inside the note minigame.
Scribing tools refill recipe and ink sac interaction.
Exact TC4 object aspect tags for all vanilla/modded items.
Thaumonomicon page gating based on discovered aspects and research.
